ruleSet: Vendor Onboarding YAPK schema v2 generation rules

appPackageInfo.longAsString: Preserve long IDs as exact strings where schema requires LongAsString.

innerAppRules.generatedIds: Use Yeeflow generate-unique-ids API for generated IDs except AppID.
innerAppRules.largeIds: Preserve 19-digit API IDs exactly and do not round through JavaScript Number.
innerAppRules.uniqueIds: LayoutID, ListID, and FieldID values must be unique in the required domains.
innerAppRules.fieldCategory: Field.Category must be an integer when present.
innerAppRules.customType: Use the v1.9-proven CustomType rule for ListSite root ListID references.

proofBoundary: These rules are proven for the Vendor Onboarding v1.15 YAPK install path. Broader package types, richer controls, record creation, and workflow runtime behavior require separate proof.
